powerContribution.availabilityReason: Per-power resolver-derived cooldown availability applied before final monster outcome axes; authored cooldown fields are fallback only.

perPowerAvailability.name: Cause Bleeding
perPowerAvailability.availabilityReason: Resolver-derived cooldown 1 was used for Phase 6 table availability; authored cooldown fields are fallback only.
